implementation_summary: Added governance drift detection and blocking automation to evidence_checker.py
methods_added: check_governance_drift() - detects 5 types of governance drift
validate_governance_drift_in_evidence() - validates drift check results in evidence
drift_types_detected: source_target_head_mismatch - source/target HEAD vs authorized objects
formal_truth_contradiction - formal truth vs baseline/readable contradictions
candidate_scope_mismatch - candidate scope vs authorized topic
